entry.title: New: Resolution 442-25 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2026-04-08
entry.content:
AND TRANSFERS/APPROPRIATES AN APPROPRIATION OUT AND FROM A DESIGNATED FUND ACCOUNT AND CREDITS SAME TO A DESIGNATED FUND ACCOUNT TO PROVIDE A GRANT TO THE PUNA COMMUNITY MEDICAL CENTER FOUNDATION FOR THE KĪPUKA FARMACY PROJECT

Transfers $1,000 from the Clerk-Council Services – Contingency Relief account (Council District 4)

Latest action: On agenda 2026-04-08

View on the council site
